contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Cache-first signature verify on contribution / sales / expenses / inventory pages
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/186
  
  Details:
  ## What changed
  
  Migrated the "Verifying your digital signature…" identity check on the four highest-traffic DApp reporter pages from the slow `assetVerify` Apps Script web app (1–3 second GAS round-trip per page load) to `DaoMembersCache.findByPublicKey()` (~50–150 ms CDN read of `dao_members.json` from `treasury-cache`):
  
  - `dapp/report_contribution.html`
  - `dapp/report_sales.html`
  - `dapp/report_dao_expenses.html`
  - `dapp/report_inventory_movement.html`
  
  Per page: added the `<script src="./scripts/dao_members_cache.js">` tag (already present on the inventory page from PR #184), replaced the `fetch(API_ENDPOINT?signature=…)` + `data.error` + `data.contributor_name` block with `await window.DaoMembersCache.findByPublicKey(publicKey)` keyed off `lookup.contributor === null` for the "not registered" branch and `lookup.contributor.name` for the welcome message, and dropped the now-unused `const API_ENDPOINT` declaration. Net 4 files changed: +35 / -64 lines.
  
  The slow GAS path stays available via `Routes.gas.assetVerify` for callers that genuinely need DAO-wide aggregates (voting rights circulated, total assets, asset-per-circulated-voting-right) — only the per-page identity check is migrated.
  
  ## Why
  
  Operator feedback: the 1–3 s splash on every page open was visibly slow, especially on mobile. The cache pattern was already in place (introduced earlier in PR #184 for the new permission gate); the four reporter pages just hadn't been migrated yet. Closing that gap takes the typical reporter-page first-paint from ~3 s to sub-second and reduces GAS quota burn on every reporter load.
  
  ## Pull requests
  
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/186 (merged)
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 25.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
